name: treatment-access-command-center
description: UiPath AgentHack 2026 treatment access orchestration demo.

scripts.build:contracts: CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/shared-schemas build && CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/demo-data build && CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/agent-runtime build
scripts.seed: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && node --import tsx/esm scripts/seed-demo-data.ts
scripts.seed:apply: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && node --import tsx/esm scripts/seed-demo-data.ts --apply
scripts.smoke:checkpoint1: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/mock-healthcare-api build && node --import tsx/esm scripts/verify-demo.ts --start-api
scripts.smoke:checkpoint4: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/mock-healthcare-api build && CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/command-center build && CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/mock-payer-portal build && node --import tsx/esm scripts/verify-checkpoint4.ts --start-api
scripts.smoke:checkpoint7-live-proof: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && CI=true pnpm --filter @tacc/mock-healthcare-api build && node --import tsx/esm scripts/verify-checkpoint7-live-proof.ts
scripts.smoke:agents: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && node --import tsx/esm scripts/verify-agents.ts
scripts.smoke:live-agents: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && node --import tsx/esm scripts/verify-live-agent-readiness.ts
scripts.test: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && CI=true vitest run scripts/*.test.ts && CI=true pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.typecheck: CI=true pnpm build:contracts && CI=true pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
scripts.verify: CI=true pnpm typecheck && CI=true pnpm test && CI=true pnpm build && pnpm verify:setup
scripts.verify:checkpoint6: CI=true pnpm verify:submission-readiness && CI=true pnpm smoke:checkpoint6-readiness
scripts.verify:rpa-portal-fallback: node --import tsx/esm scripts/verify-rpa-portal-fallback.ts && node --import tsx/esm scripts/verify-checkpoint8-rpa-proof.ts
